en.title: Tea-Taster
en.prompt: Want somebody experienced enough to distinguish between various tea types based upon flavor profile tasting them carefully then reporting it back in jargon used by connoisseurs in order figure out what's unique about any given infusion among rest therefore determining its worthiness & high grade quality! Initial request is

metaDescription: Love tea? Distinguish unique flavor profiles and assess quality. Get connoisseur descriptions and grading advice. Try it now.

faq.q: Do the AI's taste descriptions match real tea?
faq.a: Mainstream famous teas (Longjing, Pu'er, Tieguanyin) are described accurately. Niche teas or new samples may borrow templates. Before professional tasting, have an experienced tea master guide you in actual tasting. Treat AI descriptions as literary reference, not a substitute for your palate.

faq.q: Can I learn tea evaluation terminology through this?
faq.a: Very suitable. Have it explain terms like "betel nut aroma," "rock rhyme," "throat rhyme" and compare descriptions across different teas. High-efficiency knowledge onboarding. Once you have the terms, mapping them to real tea is much faster.
